subcodes.first_line: The books of God have borne witness unto this Wronged One, Who hath accepted tribulation and affliction in the path of God, the Lord of all worlds [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد شهدت کتب الله لهذا المظلوم الذی قبل الباساء و الضرآء فی سبیل الله رب العالمین
subcodes.subjects: @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @power of the Manifestation of God, @suffering and imprisonment, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause
